synergy: Little hard CC on your side — you can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
You have sustain (Narbash) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Phantom Rush → Subjugate root → Siphon → Colossal Blow
ourKits.winCondition: stack Souls to snowball Siphon and lock down with the root
ourKits.passive: ability kills grant permanent Soul stacks (HP + damage)
ourKits.playWith: a team that converts his root into kills
ourKits.playAgainst: deny his last-hits early to starve Souls; dodge the slow Subjugate

ourKits.combo: Soulfire waves → Mortal Coil pull-zone → Stupor orb → Abyssal Rift zone
ourKits.winCondition: zone a fight with Mortal Coil + ult and chunk from range
ourKits.passive: consumes essences from kills for power
ourKits.playWith: frontline to hold enemies in her zones
ourKits.playAgainst: fragile and reliant on her zones — flank/dive around the telegraphs

ourKits.combo: Reaping Dash → Hamstring slows → Safeguard spellshield → Earth Shatter execute
ourKits.winCondition: trade with the spellshield up and execute low targets with Earth Shatter
ourKits.passive: permanent power on unique hero takedowns
ourKits.playWith: setup that holds a target for the execute
ourKits.playAgainst: bait Safeguard's spellshield before committing your key CC

ourKits.combo: Thunk stun → March! speed → Song heal aura → Crash Bang Boom! AoE slow ult
ourKits.winCondition: engage with Thunk and group-buff the team through fights
ourKits.playWith: a dive team that rides his speed and heal
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge/cleanse Thunk; he's low-damage — kill his carry through the aura

enemyKits.combo: Stasis Bomb stun → Photon Disruptor slow → Containment Fence wall → Ion Strike slow ult
enemyKits.winCondition: lock a target with stun + fence and let the team collapse
enemyKits.passive: Rocket Boots mobility, refreshed by abilities
enemyKits.playWith: burst that converts her stun/fence into a kill
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Stasis Bomb; the fence zones — flank around it

enemyKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
enemyKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
enemyKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
enemyKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
enemyKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

enemyKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
enemyKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
enemyKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first
